title: Mr. 5 and Miss Valentine Press In
description: On pages 9–13, mr. 5 and miss valentine press in as luffy and Usopp push back against Baroque Works on Little Garden while Mr. 3’s wax execution threatens the crew and the giants.
scene: Mr. 5 and Miss Valentine Press In. Luffy and Usopp push back against Baroque Works on Little Garden while Mr. 3’s wax execution threatens the crew and the giants. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: What a despicable thing to do!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: How dare you place a bomb in Mr. Dorry's barrel of rum...!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The rum I... gave to him...?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Gabababa! Dorry! After all these years of drinking only water, the rum must've tasted especially fine, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: So that's how... it was... Dorry...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hmph! Who said you could disclose my trick!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Mr. S! Bring the swordsman and the girl over here!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If you're wondering about straw hat, I've taken care of him.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: welcome ladies and gentlemen, to my "service set!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh? What's that thing spinning above us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This must be what it feels like,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: to be a candle stuck on a cake...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Our enemies aren't just going to let us freely move around.

summary: This part centers on mr. 5 and miss valentine press in, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
